patch.comment: fix(ripple): correct disposed state for top-level store lenses

minor.comment: feat(ripple): store.replace()/reset() now remove omitted keys instead of nulling them, add resource().refresh() for manual refetch

minor.comment: feat(ripple): fix store patch/replace atomicity, resource() auto-dispose, SSR scheduling isolation, and add watch() multi-source support
